subject: Vendor Contract Renegotiation Results
body:
Procurement Team,

Completed renegotiation of our top 5 vendor contracts. Results:

1. AWS: Secured 3-year EDP at $2.4M/year (18% discount from on-demand). Includes $200K in credits for new services.

2. Salesforce: Renewed at $380K/year (down from $420K). Removed unused Einstein licenses, added 20 Sales Cloud seats.

3. Snowflake: New 2-year agreement at $600K/year with 30% overage protection. Previous spend was trending to $750K.

4. Datadog: Consolidated monitoring tools, new contract at $180K/year. Replacing three separate tools that cost $245K combined.

5. Legal Services (external): Fixed-fee arrangement at $15K/month for routine matters (previously averaging $22K/month on hourly billing).

Total annual savings: $563K
Thank you all for supporting these negotiations.
